Templates › Safe Work Method Statement (SWMS)

⚠️ Safe Work Method Statement (SWMS)

Document high-risk construction work activities, hazards, and control measures — required under NZ H&S regulations.

How to use: Complete a separate SWMS for each high-risk task before work starts. All fields are editable — click any text to change it.

Your logo here
SAFE WORK METHOD STATEMENT
SWMS #: SWMS-001
Date: 2026-01-01
Job: Job description / address

Health & Safety at Work Act 2015. Complete a SWMS for each high-risk construction work activity. Workers must read and sign before starting.

Principal Contractor / PCBU
Business Name
Site Address
High-Risk Activity
Describe the high-risk work (e.g. working at heights, excavation, demolition, electrical work)
Task StepHazard / RiskLikelihoodControl MeasureResidual Risk
Step 1Describe hazardHigh/Med/LowControl measure to eliminate or minimiseLow
Step 2
Step 3
Step 4
Step 5
PPE Required
Hard hat, hi-vis vest, safety boots, gloves, safety glasses, harness (if working at height)
Emergency Procedures
Emergency contact: [Name / Phone]. First aid kit location: [Location]. Nearest hospital: [Name / address].
Worker Sign-Off (all workers must sign)
NameRoleSignatureDate
Review and update this SWMS if conditions change. Keep on site for duration of work. NZ Tradie Tools — tradietools.nz

⚠️ Safe Work Method Statement (SWMS)

No sign-up required. Free forever.

How to use this template

  • Click any field to edit it
  • Fill in your business details first
  • Click "Download PDF" to save
  • Or click "Print" for a paper copy

Complete a separate SWMS for each high-risk task before work starts.
